name: :sunglasses: A curated list of robotics libraries and software
description: :sunglasses: A curated list of robotics libraries and software

links.title: ARCSim
links.description: Adaptive remeshing cloth and shell simulator for thin deformable objects.

links.title: IBDS
links.description: Impulse-based dynamics simulation for rigid bodies and particle systems.

links.title: MBDyn
links.description: General-purpose multibody dynamics analysis software. [[code](https://www.mbdyn.org/?Software_Download)]

links.title: RobWork
links.description: Framework for simulation and control of robot systems. [[gitlab](https://gitlab.com/sdurobotics/RobWork)]

links.title: CuiKSuite
links.description: Applications to solve position analysis and path planning problems.

links.title: HPP
links.description: Path planning for kinematic chains in environments cluttered with obstacles.

links.title: Faster cover trees
links.description: by Mike Izbicki et al., ICML 2015.

links.title: SDF
links.description: XML format that describes objects and environments for robot simulators, visualization, and control. [[bitbucket](https://bitbucket.org/osrf/sdformat)]

links.title: Rock
links.description: Software framework for robotic systems.

links.title: ROS
links.description: Flexible framework for writing robot software.

links.title: Foxglove Studio
links.description: A fully integrated visualization and debugging desktop app for your robotics data.

links.title: Neurorobotics Platform
links.description: Internet-accessible simulation of robots controlled by spiking neural networks. [[bitbucket](https://bitbucket.org/hbpneurorobotics/neurorobotics-platform)]

links.title: Simbad
links.description: Java 3D robot simulator with custom controller and sensor support.

links.title: Actin Simulation
links.description: Real-time robot simulation and control software.

links.title: Artiminds
links.description: Planning, programming, operation, analysis and optimization.

links.title: Kineo
links.description: Path planning and trajectory optimization for industrial robotics.

links.title: Robot Virtual Worlds
links.description: Virtual reality software for educational robotics.

links.title: RobotDK
links.description: Simulation and OLP for robots.

links.title: RobotStudio
links.description: ABB's simulation and offline programming software for robotics.

links.title: Virtual Robotics Toolkit
links.description: 3D virtual environment for programming and testing robots.

links.title: Visual Components
links.description: 3D manufacturing simulation and visualization platform.

links.title: AWS RoboMaker
links.description: Service that makes it easy to develop, test, and deploy intelligent robotics applications at scale.

links.title: Awesome Collision Detection
links.description: Curated list of collision detection libraries and resources.

links.title: Awesome Gazebo
links.description: Curated list of Gazebo simulation framework resources.

links.title: Awesome Grasping
links.description: Curated list of grasping libraries and resources.

links.title: Awesome Human Robot Interaction
links.description: Curated list of human-robot interaction libraries and resources.

links.title: Awesome Physical AI
links.description: Curated list of academic papers and resources on Physical AI.

links.title: Awesome Robotic Tooling
links.description: Tooling for professional robotic development in C++ and Python with ROS and autonomous driving.

links.title: Awesome Robotics
links.description: Curated list of robotics links and software libraries (ahundt).

links.title: Awesome VLA Study
links.description: A curated VLA (Vision-Language-Action) study guide that organizes ~30 key papers into a 6-phase, 14-week reading curriculum — covering diffusion/flow matching foundations, robot foundation model architectures, data scaling, efficient inference, RL fine-tuning, and world models.

links.title: Robotics Coursework
links.description: A list of robotics courses you can take online.
